hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); (print('Blocked: '+p+' is a protected governance file. Edit manually to preserve context integrity.') or sys.exit(2)) if any(p.endswith(x) for x in ['CLAUDE.md','CLAUDE.local.md']) else None"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); dangerous=['git reset --hard','git push --force','git push -f','git clean -f','git checkout -- .']; [(print('Blocked: '+x+' is a destructive git operation. Confirm explicitly if you really need this.') or sys.exit(2)) for x in dangerous if x in c]"

python3 -c "import sys,json,os,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); skip=any(x in p for x in ['test','spec','.json','.lock','node_modules']); skip or (os.path.exists('package.json') and subprocess.run(['sh','-c','npm test -- --passWithNoTests --silent 2>&1 | tail -5'],check=False))"
bash -c "[ -f memory/core.md ] && { echo '=== Core Memory ==='; cat memory/core.md; echo '=== End Memory ==='; }"

bash -c "git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo 'WARNING: Uncommitted changes detected. Run /checkpoint before your next session.' && git status --short | head -10 || true"
